metadata.title: SkillBrain — Persistent memory for AI coding teams
metadata.description: Persistent memory for AI coding teams. Your conventions, decisions and patterns — shared across Claude, Cursor and Copilot. MCP-native and open source.
metadata.ogAlt: SkillBrain — Persistent memory for AI coding teams

hero.eyebrow: For teams that code with AI
hero.headline:
Your AI forgets.
Your team pays the bill.
hero.sub: Every day you re-explain the same things to Claude, Cursor, Copilot. Conventions, decisions, constraints. What you built yesterday is gone today.

shift.headline: SkillBrain
shift.tagline: Persistent memory and shared skills for AI coding teams.

pillars.title: Three brains, one workspace
pillars.subtitle: A collective memory that grows with your team — and follows you everywhere.

memory.title: Memory
memory.body: Decisions, bugfixes, patterns, anti-patterns. Saved once, recalled always. No more context lost between sessions.

skills.title: Skills
skills.body: 253 curated skills shared across the whole team. From Next.js to Stripe, from SEO to Postgres. Your AI works with your seniors' know-how.

multiuser.title: Multi-user
multiuser.body: All your developers see the same brain in real time. Project conventions apply themselves.

flow.title: One query. The whole team's knowledge.
flow.body: You ask. SkillBrain recalls the memory, loads the right skill, executes. Then it saves what it learned. For next time. For anyone.

graph.title: Your codebase as a living map
graph.body: CodeGraph indexes every function, every dependency, every impact. Before renaming a class you know exactly what breaks. No more refactor in the dark.

team.title: Your whole team shares the same mind
team.body: Team API keys, roles, scoping. A single MCP server powers VS Code, Cursor, Claude Code, Codex. Your dev in Prague and your dev in Milan start from the same context.

future.title: Agentic evolution
future.body: Soon: autonomous agents writing skills for themselves. Live integrations. A marketplace of domain-specialized brains.

proof.title: Real numbers. Production code.
proof.caseStudy: Pixarts built 12 client websites in 6 months without re-explaining anything to the AI. SkillBrain is in production, today.

opensource.title: Self-host in 5 minutes
opensource.body: MIT-licensed on GitHub. Works with Claude Code, Cursor, Codex. Zero lock-in. Configure once, use everywhere.

call.title: Or let us set it up for you
call.body: We install SkillBrain in your team's workflow, train the brain on your codebase, and tune it for two weeks. You see results from day one.
call.trust: Built and used in production by Pixarts.

footer.tagline: Persistent memory for AI coding teams.

form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your current AI workflow and where you want to go.
form.earlyAccess: I'm interested in early access to managed cloud
form.successBody: We'll reply within 24 business hours, directly from Daniel.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Pixarts S.r.l., data controller, describes below how it processes personal data collected through this site.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: This site uses only essential technical cookies and privacy-first analytics (Plausible, no cookies). No profiling cookies.
